core_positions.stop: -15% from avg cost or thesis break

satellite_positions.entry_zone: only on 10%+ pullback from local high

hedges.purpose: Tail protection if capex cycle stresses

invalidation_triggers: Any Mag4 hyperscaler cuts forward capex guide >10% -> exit satellites, halve core
HY credit spreads widen past 500bp OR aggressive 2s10s un-inversion -> cash to 40%
MSFT or GOOGL breaks 200-day weekly close with volume -> exit that core name

quarterly_roadmap.Q2_2026: Initiate half-weight MSFT + GOOGL ($700 each). Watch NVDA earnings late May.
quarterly_roadmap.Q3_2026: Complete scale-in. Initiate AVGO on pullback. Trim satellites if sentiment euphoric.
quarterly_roadmap.Q4_2026: Earnings gauntlet. Exit satellites if Mag4 capex guide cut >10%.
quarterly_roadmap.Q1_2027: Rebalance. Trim winners over 25%. Re-harvest to cash or laggards.

meetings.notes: First strategy meeting run pre-v0.8 ship — retroactively logged. Earned the .strategy feature.
